description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single job named regression that runs in the default test stage using the runner's default Docker image. The job executes the exact shell commands: apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y python3-pip, pip3 install -U ., and ./tests/all.sh. No additional variables, services, caches, artifacts, or rules are defined, so the job runs on every pipeline execution.
